module.name: agent
module.purpose: Agent public surface for a first minimal single-request loop engine runtime, remoc-backed frontdoor session/task endpoints, public model request and backend type interfaces, Deepseek backend implementation, and future retrieval/tool interfaces.

childModules.name: engine
childModules.purpose: Minimal session-scoped loop engine runtime with session status, one-initial-message task contexts, client-visible runtime task events, model streaming, and lifecycle error types.

childModules.name: frontdoor
childModules.purpose: Agent frontdoor session/task endpoint backed by remoc/TCP and aligned with engine-owned task execution returning runtime event receivers.

childModules.name: model
childModules.purpose: Public model request interface, backend type selection, crate-internal backend implementation boundary, model error definitions, and streaming Deepseek backend implementation through common external namespaces.
